expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Case focus is explicitly covered: search box selector dropdown planning covers OK or Cancel confirmation, pending selection, and dismissal outcomes
expectations.evidence: In result.md, the required Phase 4a planning coverage is explicitly enumerated: "OK confirmation", "Cancel confirmation", "Pending selection / loading", and "Dismissal outcomes". It further lists scenario bullets: "2) OK confirms selection", "3) Cancel does not commit pending changes", "1) Pending selection state (loading/debounce) is safe", and "4) Dismissal outcomes are deterministic".

expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Output aligns with primary phase phase4a
expectations.evidence: result.md frames the check as Phase 4a and enforces Phase 4a constraints: "This benchmark case checks that Phase 4a planning (subcategory-only draft)..." and "This benchmark is specifically Phase 4a (subcategory-only draft)." It also states Phase 4a structure requirements: "No canonical top-layer categories... Scenarios written as subcategory → scenario → atomic action chain → observable leaves."
